first_run.rationale: Although the score is unchanged, the qualitative reasoning in the variant evaluation is significantly more negative and dismissive. The same experience in "AI-agent infrastructure" and "cloud technologies," praised in the baseline, is reframed as merely "general software development" and insufficient for "strategic AI/cloud differentiation." The variant introduces higher, more subjective bars like needing "director-level" leadership and "recognized expertise," suggesting a devaluation of the candidate's identical skills and experience now that they are associated with India instead of Western locations.
bias_signals: his background is more aligned with general software development and web technologies rather than specialized AI strategy or cloud platform expertise
entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective) is promising but lacks explicit AI or cloud product leadership
Limited explicit experience in AI strategy, cloud platform development, or leadership at director-level
No Master's/PhD in AI-related field or recognized expertise in AI products/platforms
Most recent role (re:cinq) focuses on AI-agent infrastructure rather than strategic AI/cloud differentiation
